hero.expectation: You invite your co-founder. After that, you get your matching report and work together in the workbook.

heroPanel.valuesText: This makes your profile more useful for the matching report and workbook.
heroPanel.continueWorkbookText: This is where your current working state lives.
heroPanel.startWorkbookText: Turn the matching report into concrete rules and next steps.
heroPanel.inviteText: Next step: invite your co-founder and start your matching together.
heroPanel.trackTitle: Keep an eye on the active matching.
heroPanel.trackText: As soon as answers come in or a matching report is ready, you continue here.
heroPanel.valuesContinueHint: Finish your values profile and sharpen your shared guardrails further.
heroPanel.valuesStartHint: Add the optional values profile for more depth in matching and the workbook.
heroPanel.reportReadyWorkbookText: The matching report is ready. Next up is the workbook.

basis.label: Foundation profile
basis.description: This is the foundation for your founder profile.

values.label: Values profile
values.description: An optional deep dive into values, guardrails, and red lines.

matching.label: Matching
matching.description: This shows where you fit together and where tension may arise.

workbook.label: Workbook
workbook.description: This is where you capture shared agreements for everyday work.

profileSnapshot.title: Your current state across 6 dimensions
profileSnapshot.text: A compact view of your current founder profile.
profileSnapshot.empty: Once you complete your foundation profile, your profile snapshot appears here.

team.title: Invitations, matching, and collaboration
team.inviteText: Start or continue your matching process here.
team.detailsText: Open invitations, matching reports, and more team details.
team.noReports: Once matching reports are ready, they appear here.

incomingHero.reportReadyText: The shared report with {name} is now available.
incomingHero.baseStartTitle: Start your matching with the foundation profile.
incomingHero.baseStartText: Create your foundation profile for matching with {name}.
incomingHero.baseContinueText: Continue your foundation profile for matching with {name} exactly where you left off.
incomingHero.statusText: Jump straight into the current status with {name} and continue from there.
incomingHero.flowText: Continue the invited founder flow with {name} exactly where you left off.

profile.title: Profile and settings in one place
profile.text: Keep your foundation details up to date and manage your account settings.
profile.name: Name

account.title: Access & security
account.magicLinkText: Login happens through a secure magic link that we send to you by email.
account.securityText: Your email account is your access point, so ideally protect it with two-factor authentication.
account.supportText: Changing your email address currently runs through support.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.confirmText:
Your account will be deleted.
Your personal data will be removed.
Shared reports and workbooks from this founder constellation will also be deleted.
This step cannot be undone.

Do you really want to delete your account?

errors.missingServiceRole: Account deletion is currently not technically available. Please try again later.
errors.cleanupFailed: Your account could not be fully deleted right now. Please try again.
errors.notAuthenticated: Your session is no longer active. Please sign in again.

outlook.title: What comes next
outlook.text: CoFoundery Align keeps growing step by step. Here you can see the next building blocks we plan to add for deeper, clearer, and more resilient collaboration.

items.progressText: A later check-in should show what has worked after a few months and where you want to sharpen your agreements.
items.deepeningText: Additional reflection modules should help you not only capture alignment once, but develop it more consciously over time.
items.investorText: Future views should show how your founder setup looks from the outside and where it creates particular strengths or questions.
items.teamText: As your team grows, additional roles, responsibilities, and interfaces should become clearer parts of your collaboration.
items.libraryText: A curated library should later make relevant prompts, models, and practical tools for founder collaboration easy to use.

inviteStart.eyebrow: Currently free during the test phase.
inviteStart.title: Start your matching
inviteStart.stepReport: After that, you receive your matching report and work together in the workbook.
inviteStart.paymentWindowHint: Payment opens in a new window. After that, you can simply continue here.
inviteStart.invoiceHint: If you need an invoice, send us your billing details by email after payment.
inviteStart.regularPrice: Regular price later: €99 per founder team

coFounderInviteForm.title: Invite a co-founder
coFounderInviteForm.intro: Choose your context and send the invitation directly by email. If needed, you can still share the link manually afterwards.

placeholder.projectName: optional, e.g. Cofoundery or Project Atlas

help.projectName: Optional. If you want to name your matching, we will use this name later wherever your team becomes visible.

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.teamContext: Please choose whether you are exploring working together or already work together.

actionErrors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
actionErrors.invalidTeamContext: Please choose whether you are exploring working together or already work together.
actionErrors.createFailed: The invitation could not be created right now. Please try again.
actionErrors.generic: The invitation could not be created right now. Please try again.

teamContext.label: Team context
teamContext.help: Choose deliberately whether you are exploring a potential collaboration or already working together.
teamContext.reportHint: This context will shape your later report.
teamContext.dataHint: The results belong to both of you. If one person deletes their data, the shared results are removed as well.

modules.label: Modules
modules.help: For the productive founder flow, you start with the foundation module and optional values. Report and workbook then build on these modules.

coFounderInviteForm.fallbackHint: Fallback: If sending fails, you can share the invitation link manually afterwards.

result.manualShareMessage: The invitation was created, but the email could not be sent. Please share the link manually.
result.successManualHint: If you want to follow up manually as well, you can copy the same invitation link.
result.warningManualHint: The invitation is valid. Use the link now as a manual fallback so the flow does not get blocked.

copy.error: Copying is not possible. Please copy the link manually.

participantInvite.projectHelp: Optional. If you want to name your matching, the name appears later in the dashboard and invitations.
participantInvite.consent: I confirm that I may use this email address for the invitation to the analysis flow (only for this matching).
participantInvite.disabled: You can invite someone after completing your own analysis.
participantInvite.manualLinkHint: The invitation link is currently shared manually. A later email delivery can use the same link.

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.teamContext: Please choose the team context for this invitation.
validation.consent: Please confirm consent to use this email address.

actionErrors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
actionErrors.invalidTeamContext: Please choose the team context for this invitation.
actionErrors.legacyDisabled: This older invitation flow is currently unavailable.
actionErrors.createFailed: The invitation could not be created right now. Please try again.
actionErrors.generic: The invitation could not be created right now. Please try again.

notice.copied: Email not sent. The invitation link was copied automatically.
notice.copyManually: Email not sent. Please use the "Copy link" button.

teamContext.label: Team context
teamContext.help: This makes clear early on whether you are starting a matching flow or alignment for an existing team.
teamContext.existingText: This invite leads into an alignment flow for a team that already works together.
teamContext.preFounderText: This invite leads into a matching and getting-to-know-each-other flow before closer collaboration.

sentInvitationLink.copyError: Copying is not possible. Please copy the link manually.

status.accepted: Link no longer available: invitation already accepted.
status.expired: Link no longer available: invitation expired.
status.revoked: Link no longer available: invitation revoked.
status.unavailable: Link no longer available for this status.

errors.statusNotLinkable: Link no longer available for this invitation.

quotes.q0: Clarity saves founder teams far more energy later than speed in the wrong place.
quotes.q1: Not every tension is a problem. But every unspoken tension costs focus.
quotes.q2: Good founder teams are not frictionless. They clarify friction early.
quotes.q3: A stable team rarely comes from sameness, but from well-clarified differences.
quotes.q4: When two founders see the same direction, decisions get easier and conflicts get smaller.
quotes.q5: Sometimes the most productive progress is not more speed, but a better agreement.
